title: Board Members of POEA
content: The text lists the names and titles of the board members of the Philippine Overseas Employment Administration (POEA): Patricia A. Sto. Tomas (Chairperson), Rosalinda Dimapilis-Baldoz (Board Member), Luzviminda L. Elbinias (Board Member), Ezekiel T. Alunen (Board Member), Vicente F. Aldanese (Board Member), and Gregorio S. Oca (Board Member).

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Full Text.pdf
